Table of Contents

Interface ITimeZoneInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the time zone information.

[Guid("0F8FD6AB-CE6D-4BB2-A5EF-2F6035E304C5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITimeZoneInfo

Properties

CustomDescription

Custom description for the time zone.

string CustomDescription { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DaylightTimeName

The time zone name during daylight time.

string DaylightTimeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefaultRule

The default time zone adjustment rule.

ITimeZoneRule DefaultRule { get; set; }

Property Value

ITimeZoneRule

Examples

Sample Snippet

DisplayName

Descriptive display name of the time zone.

string DisplayName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DynamicRule[int]

The dynamic adjustment rule for a specific year.

ITimeZoneRule DynamicRule[int Year] { get; }

Parameters

Year int

Property Value

ITimeZoneRule

Examples

Sample Snippet

DynamicRulesCount

Number of dynamic adjustment rules for the time zone.

int DynamicRulesCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

FirstDynamicRuleYear

The first dynamic adjustment rule year.

int FirstDynamicRuleYear { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

LastDynamicRuleYear

The last dynamic adjustment rule year.

int LastDynamicRuleYear { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NextDynamicRuleYear[int]

The next dynamic adjustment rule year that cyclicly proceeds the given dynamic adjustment rule year.

int NextDynamicRuleYear[int currentDynamicRuleYear] { get; }

Parameters

currentDynamicRuleYear int

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StandardTimeName

The time zone name during standard time.

string StandardTimeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

WindowsID

Time zone Windows ID name.

string WindowsID { get; set; }

string
